text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, Sakura Bakushin O's homeroom teacher
wants to talk to me about her grades.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She's a serious student, but her grades are
lacking. I want to help her, but...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Dum dum da dum. ♪ In spring, the dawn. ♪ In
summer, the night. ♪

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Well, well, if it isn't my trainer!
choice_data_list:
Was that "The Pillow Book" you were quoting
just now?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oh! You recognized it! We studied it in today's
class.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
The passage describing the wonders of the four
seasons really left a strong impression on me.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
It was such a powerful passage! The impact made
me forget everything else we read!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Forgetting things as soon as you learn them
certainly makes it difficult to get a good score on
tests. The best way to help her improve would
be...
choice_data_list: To praise and encourage her to study.
To provide her an opportunity to review.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She might improve her grades if I raise her
motivation and concentration through praise and
encouragement...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Heh heh! Naturally!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
As the class representative, I strive to set an
example for everyone and properly attend my
classes!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Feel free to praise me more, if you like!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
I'm the type of person who improves with extra
praise!
choice_data_list:
You've got to keep up this energy while
studying for the tests!

You've got to keep up this energy while
studying for the tests!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Oh, studying for tests! The hallmark of a model
student such as I!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
You mean to strike while the iron is hot! Great
advice, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'll be off! I'll be going Bakushin,
BAKUSHIIIN on that test!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
A high-spirited Sakura Bakushin O departs with
an expression on her face that exudes confidence.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Some days later...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Guess what, Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: I scored two points higher on the test this time!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
My score rose from two to four! That's double!
DOUBLE!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Wow! Turns out studying for tests really is super
important!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Yes! I'll Bakushin along the path of the model
student!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It was only one small step, but there's no doubt it
led to her getting a higher score.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Sakura Bakushin O and I share a moment of
excitement over her grades improving.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If I provide her with future opportunities to talk
about her classes, it'd make for good review.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I try to focus on her interests so she won't forget
the things she learned...
choice_data_list:
How would you describe the four seasons,
Bakushin O?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Oh! Good question!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: If it were me...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Bakushin in the spring! Running along the cherry
tree-lined roads as their blossoms flutter down!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Bakushin in the summer! Running under the
blazing sun is great too!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Bakushin in the fall! Running through the
mountains while admiring the colorful autumn
leaves!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Bakushin in the winter! Running in the snow with
more vigor than a wolf!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: ...That's about it! What do you think?

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Weeell?!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: Heh heh! That it is!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
The day I am known as the Sei Shonagon of
Tracen Academy might not be so far off!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
If I get super famous, I'll be in high demand no
matter the race...
choice_data_list: (Hmm, I'm not so sure that's how it works.)

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Either way, it at least seems she hasn't lost
interest in The Pillow Book.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Let's move on to questions that will likely appear
on the test...

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Ahhh! Just imagining the scenery makes me want
to run so bad!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
Let's get an early start on today's training! We
begin now!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
With the words barely out of her mouth, Sakura
Bakushin O dashes off at full speed.

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text: WOOO!

text_block_list.name: Sakura Bakushin O
text_block_list.text:
SPRING! SUMMER! FALL! WINTER! BAKUSHIN
ALL YEAR ROUND!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's amazing how she puts all her energy into
everything she does. The one issue is her lack of
persistence and composure.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I let her homeroom teacher know that keeping
these factors in mind is essential for improving
her performance.
